parsed.production_notes: The video is a 2D vector animation featuring stylized character designs and simulated app interfaces. It does not exhibit artifacts typical of generative AI.

characters.appearance: Stylized 2D male character with brown skin, black hair, and a thick black mustache. He has half-closed eyes and a prominent nose.
characters.wardrobe: Pink shirt with a green collar detail.

scenes.setting: Abstract green background with a chessboard.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits behind a checkered board. Several stylized game pieces are visible in the foreground on the board. The background is a solid, dark green color. Character A looks directly forward with a neutral, slightly bored expression.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is positioned behind a chessboard against a green background. Text appears above his head as he speaks.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Want to learn chess? [Want to learn chess?]
Character A says: Prove it. [Prove it.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Want to learn chess?
Prove it.

panels.panel_visual_description: A top-down view of a white and grey checkered grid. Various stylized game pieces, including a horse head, a crown, and simple pawns, are placed on the grid. In the top left corner, the head and shoulders of Character A are visible. Character A's facial expressions change slightly throughout.

scenes.visual_description: A screencast of a chess puzzle application. Character A's head appears in the top left corner with speech bubbles. A user interacts with the chessboard, making various moves.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Alright, let's start with the knight. [Alright, let's start with the knight.]
Character A says: Giddy up! You've got potential. [Giddy up! You've got potential.]
Character A says: But don't get too cocky... [But don't get too cocky...]
Character A says: This isn't checkers, darling. [This isn't checkers, darling.]
Character A says: My blood pressure is rising! [My blood pressure is rising!]
Character A says: Finally, a move worthy of applause. [Finally, a move worthy of applause.]
Character A says: Duolingo Chess is available on the latest app version! [Duolingo Chess is available on the latest app version!]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Solve the puzzle
CONTINUE

scenes.setting: Abstract green background transitioning to a solid green screen.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits behind a checkered board with game pieces, his hands clasped together in front of him. The background is a solid green color with abstract, lighter green and pink cloud-like shapes appearing behind him. The scene then transitions to a completely blank, bright green screen.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is back behind the chessboard, hands clasped. The background features abstract shapes. The video ends with a solid green screen displaying a brand logo.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Download it now and start building your strategy. [Download it now and start building your strategy.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Download it now and start building your strategy.
duolingo
